segments.text: clean code from sonar is the gold
standard for writing code in software
development and the clean as you code
methodology is how you apply it by
focusing on code that's added or changed
getting started is easy
set up the project using Sonar Cube or
sonar Cloud so that you can synchronize
the team around the activity of cleaning
the code and enforce the quality gate in
build and promotion activities
in this case we will be using Sonar Cube
ensure the project has a new code
definition that aligns with your team's
development cycle
as well as a compliant quality gate
individual developers clean as they code
using Sonar lint in their IDE connected
to the team sonar instance
here's what it looks like to install
sonar Lin in vs code
you can similarly install sonar lint in
Eclipse visual studio and jetbrains Ides
such as IntelliJ as well
connecting sonar lint to sonar Cube or
sonar Cloud brings added benefits to
your clean as you code Journey
getting set up is easy it just takes a
few clicks
sonar guides you through the process
with this connection clean code
expectations are shared between you and
your team
sonar Lin will identify issues in the
new code you add as well as the existing
code that you've opened
issues are clearly highlighted along
with why it's an issue how to fix it and
more
start your journey to clean code today
with clean as you code at
sonarsource.com

fullText: clean code from sonar is the gold standard for writing code in software development and the clean as you code methodology is how you apply it by focusing on code that's added or changed getting started is easy set up the project using Sonar Cube or sonar Cloud so that you can synchronize the team around the activity of cleaning the code and enforce the quality gate in build and promotion activities in this case we will be using Sonar Cube ensure the project has a new code definition that aligns with your team's development cycle as well as a compliant quality gate individual developers clean as they code using Sonar lint in their IDE connected to the team sonar instance here's what it looks like to install sonar Lin in vs code you can similarly install sonar lint in Eclipse visual studio and jetbrains Ides such as IntelliJ as well connecting sonar lint to sonar Cube or sonar Cloud brings added benefits to your clean as you code Journey getting set up is easy it just takes a few clicks sonar guides you through the process with this connection clean code expectations are shared between you and your team sonar Lin will identify issues in the new code you add as well as the existing code that you've opened issues are clearly highlighted along with why it's an issue how to fix it and more start your journey to clean code today with clean as you code at sonarsource.com
